description: Guardrails leves e determinísticos do projeto Evento Celebrativo.

hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$OutputEncoding = [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); $root = (& git rev-parse --show-toplevel).Trim(); $payload = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $payload | node (Join-Path $root '.codex/hooks/pre-tool-guard.mjs'); exit $LASTEXITCODE"

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$OutputEncoding = [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); $root = (& git rev-parse --show-toplevel).Trim(); $payload = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $payload | node (Join-Path $root '.codex/hooks/post-edit-check.mjs'); exit $LASTEXITCODE"
